headline_template: Most recent {grain_label}: {latest_z_score_magnitude} standard deviations from mean

key_insight_phrases.significant_anomaly: Recent {grain_label} shows significant deviation from historical norm
key_insight_phrases.moderate_anomaly: Recent {grain_label} deviates modestly from historical norm

caveats.denominator_unstable: Historical volatility is high (CoV={cov:.2f}) — threshold-based detection may be unreliable
caveats.low_coverage_adequate: Data coverage is below optimal — recent period may be incomplete
caveats.minimum_data_warning: Only {period_count} periods for baseline — anomaly thresholds may be unstable
